verificationScope: Repository evidence and GitHub Actions on draft pull request #10. Production use, product-market fit, complete sandboxing, external research quality and positive recursive improvement are not claimed.

capabilities.summary: Deterministic evidence-gated cycle stages with terminal rejection, rollback and inconclusive paths.
A0-A4 autonomy and R0-R4 risk policy with cycle-bound exact-scope, versioned, expiring and revocable approval records.
checks: Unit tests cover wrong scope and expired approval rejection

capabilities.summary: Append-only synchronized journal, atomic snapshots, corruption recovery, checksums, serialized writers and stale-writer rejection.
checks: Snapshot recovery and interrupted trailing-write tests
limitations: Event-schema migration fixtures are not complete
Kill-process tests at every persistence boundary are not complete
A multi-process stress suite is not complete

capabilities.summary: Immutable SHA-256 blobs are deduplicated separately from contextual evidence occurrences; read-time digest verification is available.
checks: Distinct occurrence records for identical blobs

capabilities.summary: Bounded repository inventory, package/check discovery, CI and product-signal detection, Git state and structural trust-boundary mapping.
Discovered package scripts run without a shell in temporary source copies with timeout, bounded output, reduced environment and secret redaction; results feed an evidence-backed scorecard.
limitations: Temporary workspace is not a security sandbox
Filesystem write containment is not enforced

capabilities.summary: Read-only decision framing, reproducible research, atomic claims, contradiction review, three opportunities and a smallest reversible experiment.
Next.js reference product provides landing, auth, protected app, notes, profile, optional billing and realistic trust boundaries for Evolution Engine dogfood.
